nasb.text: ‘Take from among you a contribution to the Lord; whoever is of a willing heart, let him bring it as the Lord’s contribution: gold, silver, and bronze,

esv.text: Take from among you a contribution to the Lord. Whoever is of a generous heart, let him bring the Lord’s contribution: gold, silver, and bronze;

cnv.text: ‘你們要從你們中間拿禮物來給耶和華，凡是甘心樂意的，都可以把耶和華的禮物帶來，就是金、銀、銅、

ccb.text: “凡慷慨乐捐的，都可以把下列物品献给耶和华为礼物，即金，银，铜，
